_note: Addresses for the PND onchain-protocol reference. Two kinds of key: shared singletons (one canonical instance) and `*Implementation` keys (the shared logic contract that per-owner EIP-1167 clones delegatecall to, shown at the top of each clone's page). The Surface core (`surfaceFactory`, `sequentialImplementation`, `pooledImplementation`, `minterImplementation`) deployed to mainnet 2026-07-22 from commit fa5af29 (DeploySurfaceSystem.s.sol); the factory lands paused. `defaultRenderer` and `renderAssets` are the deferred render modules (DeployRenderModules.s.sol) and stay empty until a collection needs them. Fill an empty value and re-run `pnpm generate:docs` to resolve its address.
